title: Agnipath Scheme
meta_description: Agnipath scheme recruits Agniveers for 4-year tenure in Indian Army, Navy, and Air Force. Check eligibility, salary, benefits, and application process.

hero.one_liner: 4-year military service opportunity in Indian Army, Navy, and Air Force with ₹30,000-40,000 monthly salary and ₹11.71 lakh seva nidhi

what_is_it: Agnipath is a military recruitment scheme launched on 14 June 2022 for Indian youth to serve in the Armed Forces (Army, Navy, Air Force) for a period of 4 years. Recruits are called 'Agniveers'. After 4 years, up to 25% of each batch are retained for regular service (15+ years), while the rest are released with a tax-free lump sum called Seva Nidhi.

Agniveers receive a starting salary of approximately ₹30,000/month in the first year, increasing to around ₹40,000/month by the fourth year. 30% of salary is deducted as Seva Nidhi contribution, which the government matches equally. At the end of 4 years, the released Agniveer receives approximately ₹11.71 lakh as tax-free Seva Nidhi package.

eligibility.label: Education (Army)
eligibility.value: 10th pass for General Duty, 12th pass for Technical/Clerk

eligibility.label: Education (Navy/AF)
eligibility.value: 12th pass with Physics & Maths for most entries

eligibility.label: Physical fitness
eligibility.value: Must pass physical fitness test, medical examination

how_to_apply.title: Visit joinindianarmy.nic.in (Army) or respective portals
how_to_apply.description: For Army: joinindianarmy.nic.in. For Navy: joinindiannavy.gov.in. For Air Force: agnipathvayu.cdac.in. Register and create account.

how_to_apply.title: Fill online application
how_to_apply.description: Enter personal details, education, physical measurements. Upload photo, signature, and certificates.

how_to_apply.title: Appear for recruitment rally/exam
how_to_apply.description: Army: Physical test + written exam + medical. Navy/Air Force: Online exam + physical + medical at designated centers.

how_to_apply.title: Training and posting
how_to_apply.description: Selected candidates undergo training (6 months to 1 year depending on force and trade) before being posted to units.

important_alert.text: Recruitment notifications are released periodically — not continuously open. Follow official portals and Indian Army/Navy/Air Force social media for latest rally dates and online exam schedules.

important_dates.label: Retention
important_dates.value: Up to 25% retained for permanent service after 4 years

faqs.question: What happens after 4 years if I'm not retained?
faqs.answer: You receive ₹11.71 lakh tax-free Seva Nidhi, a certificate of service, and priority in various government recruitment. Several states and central PSUs have announced reservation/preference for ex-Agniveers.

faqs.question: What is the salary structure?
faqs.answer: Year 1: ₹30,000/month. Year 2: ₹33,000. Year 3: ₹36,500. Year 4: ₹40,000. Plus risk and hardship allowances, free food, accommodation, medical, and travel.

faqs.question: Can women apply?
faqs.answer: Yes. Women can apply for Agniveer positions in the Indian Army, Navy, and Air Force. Specific entries and trades may vary.

faqs.question: Is there age relaxation for SC/ST?
faqs.answer: The standard age limit is 17.5-23 years. Some relaxations were provided for initial batches. Check the latest notification for current age criteria.
